implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Coach test execution for testing tasks
Actionable Coach feedback on test failures

completion_promises.evidence: Updated DEFAULT_PROFILES[TaskType.TESTING] in guardkit/models/task_types.py to set tests_required=True (changed from False). Verified by unit tests: test_create_testing_profile, test_for_type_returns_testing_profile, test_default_profiles_testing_configuration, test_get_profile_with_testing, test_workflow_testing_task all assert tests_required is True.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Coach independently executes test files written by testing tasks
completion_promises.evidence: Coach's run_independent_tests method (coach_validator.py:2976) already implements test execution via subprocess or SDK dispatch. With tests_required=True on the TESTING profile, the Coach will now invoke this method for testing tasks. The method detects pytest commands and runs them against the worktree.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test failures produce actionable Coach feedback
completion_promises.evidence: Coach's run_independent_tests returns IndependentTestResult with test_output_summary (summarized via _summarize_test_output at coach_validator.py:5276) and raw_output. The classify_test_failure method (coach_validator.py:5077) provides specific failure classification. This was already implemented before this task.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `zero_test_blocking` remains False (don't block if no test runner available)
completion_promises.evidence: Added zero_test_blocking=False to the TESTING profile in DEFAULT_PROFILES[TaskType.TESTING] in guardkit/models/task_types.py. This prevents blocking on zero-test anomalies for testing tasks since they may be writing the first tests.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tasks that only create test infrastructure (conftest.py) don't false-fail
completion_promises.evidence: With zero_test_blocking=False, the Coach will not block approval if a testing task produces zero test files. Additionally, run_independent_tests returns tests_passed=True when test_cmd is None (no matching tests found), which handles conftest.py-only tasks gracefully.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test verifies the updated profile
completion_promises.evidence: Updated 5 existing unit tests in tests/unit/test_task_types.py to assert the new TESTING profile values: tests_required=True and zero_test_blocking=False. All 123 tests pass (0 failures).
